Casing contour plots phase-locked to the rotor additionally provide a strong hint on prestall disturbances clearly not to be caused by a leading edge separation. Data taken beyond the stalling limit demonstrate a complex superposition of stall cells and flow disturbances, which the title “prestall disturbance” therefore does not fit to precisely any more. Different convection speeds allow the phenomena to be clearly distinguished from each other. Furthermore, statistical analysis of the pressure fluctuations caused by the prestall disturbances offer the potential to use them as a stall precursor or to quantify the deterioration of the clearance height between the rotor blade tips and the casing wall during the lifetime of an engine.
summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究单级轴流压气机转子叶尖区域的离散失速前流动扰动。采用周向和轴向压力传感器测量壁面压力，结合频率分析方法分类扰动。核心发现包括：失速前扰动数量与旋转不稳定性的频谱特征匹配，传播速度随流量系数降低线性增加且与间隙尺寸无关，扰动非前缘分离引起，可作为失速前兆或间隙高度恶化指标。
method: 实验方法，使用周向和轴向压力传感器测量时间分辨壁面压力，保持流量系数恒定，分析不同间隙尺寸下的扰动传播。
innovation: 创新点在于结合周向和轴向压力测量，提供准瞬时机匣压力云图，明确失速前扰动与旋转不稳定性的关联，并揭示其传播速度独立于间隙尺寸。
conclusions: 失速前扰动传播速度随流量系数降低线性增加，且与叶尖间隙尺寸无关；扰动可作为失速前兆，用于量化发动机寿命期间转子叶尖与机匣壁间隙高度恶化。
limitations: 研究基于单级压气机实验，可能未涵盖多级效应或复杂进气畸变条件，且未涉及数值模拟验证。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究压气机失速前稳定性，涉及叶尖间隙和流动扰动分析，与用户课题预测叶尖畸变下稳定裕度高度相关。

title: Description of the Flow in a Two-Stage Low-Pressure Turbine With Hub Cavities
abstract: Abstract In gas turbine, multi-stage row blading and technological effects can exhibit significant differences for the flow compared with isolated smooth blade rows. Upstream stages promote a non-uniform flow field at the inlet of the downstream rows that may have large effects on mixing or boundary layer transition processes. The rows of current turbines (and compressors) are already very closely spaced. Axial gaps between adjacent rows of approximately 1/4 to 1/2 of the axial blade chord are common practice. Future designs with higher loading and lower aspect ratios, i.e., fewer and bigger blades, and the ever present aim at minimizing engine length or compactness, will aggravate this condition even further. Interaction between cascade rows will therefore keep increasing and need to be taken into account in loss generation estimation. Also the cavities at hub platform induce purge flow blowing into main annulus and additional losses for the turbine. A robust method to account for the loss generated due to these different phenomena needs to be used. The notion of exergy (energy in the purpose to generate work) provides a general framework to deal with the different transfers of energy between the flow and the gas turbine. This study investigates the flow in a two-stage configuration representative of a low-pressure turbine including hub cavities based on large eddy simulation (LES). A description of the flow in the cavities, the main annulus, and at rim seal interface is proposed. The assessment of loss generated in the configuration is proposed based on an exergy analysis. The study of losses restricted to boundary layer contributions and secondary flows show the interaction processes of secondary vortices and wake generated in upstream rows on the flow in downstream rows.
summary_zh: 本研究基于大涡模拟（LES）分析了两级低压涡轮（含轮毂腔）的流动特性，重点关注轮毂腔、主流道及密封界面的流动描述。通过熵分析评估损失，揭示了上游级产生的二次涡和尾迹对下游级流动的相互作用过程，强调了级间间隙减小和轮毂腔吹气对损失生成的影响。
method: 采用大涡模拟（LES）进行数值研究，工况为两级低压涡轮配置，轴向间隙约为叶弦的1/4至1/2，包括轮毂腔和吹气效应。
innovation: 创新点在于结合熵分析框架量化多级涡轮中轮毂腔吹气和级间相互作用导致的损失，为高负荷、低展弦比设计提供损失预测方法。
conclusions: 关键结论：上游级产生的二次涡和尾迹显著影响下游级流动，导致额外损失；轮毂腔吹气引入主流道增加混合和边界层过渡损失。
limitations: 局限可能包括仅基于数值模拟缺乏实验验证，以及研究限于特定两级配置，未扩展到更多级或不同工况。
relevance_reason: 论文涉及多级流动相互作用和损失分析，与压气机稳定性研究中的流动稳定性部分相关，但未直接聚焦叶尖间隙或机匣处理。

title: Optimization of Slots-Groove Coupled Casing Treatment for an Axial Transonic Compressor
abstract: Abstract A multi-objective optimization of a coupled casing treatment (CCT) for an axial transonic compressor is performed in this study. The coupled casing treatment is the basis axial slots with a circumferential groove located at various positions along the slots. During the optimization stage, five important parameters to control the geometry are used as the optimal variables. The stall margin and the peak efficiency are selected as the optimal objectives. Non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II coupled with radial basis function (RBF) approximation is used to search for Pareto-optimal solutions. Then, four optimal configurations are selected from Pareto-front for further analysis. As shown in the simulation results with and without the coupled casing treatments, the leakage flow is reenergized and the blocking region near the blade leading edge at rotor tip is decreased by the use of these structures under the low flowrate condition, which is the main reason for stability enhancement. Besides, a coupled casing treatment with the groove settled near the end of the basis slots have the potential to generate more injection flow and extend the operating range of compressor further.
summary_zh: 本研究对轴向跨音速压气机的耦合机匣处理进行了多目标优化，采用非支配排序遗传算法II结合径向基函数近似搜索帕累托最优解。优化结果表明，在低流量条件下，耦合处理能重新激励泄漏流并减少转子叶尖前缘的阻塞区域，从而提升稳定性，其中槽道位于基础槽末端的配置可产生更多喷射流，进一步扩展压气机工作范围。
relevance_reason: 论文直接针对压气机稳定性优化和机匣处理设计，与研究方向高度相关。
innovation: 结合轴向槽道与周向槽道的耦合机匣处理优化，通过多目标遗传算法和RBF近似方法，系统探索几何参数对稳定性和效率的影响。
conclusions: 耦合机匣处理能有效增强压气机稳定性，减少叶尖前缘阻塞；槽道位置优化可进一步扩展工作范围。
